_meta.note: Draconic Knacks (Feats of Scale / Transformation families) — paraphrased hooks only. Full tags, costs, and forms live in Scion: Dragon.
_meta.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf, Flight Path favored lists (pp. 42, 53, 63, 73, 84, 93) and Draconic Knacks chapter

devastatingDragonsPresence.name: Devastating Dragon’s Presence
devastatingDragonsPresence.description: Project overwhelming draconic awe or menace to command a scene.
devastatingDragonsPresence.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: social / fear tilt keyed to Feats of Scale; confirm dice with Dragon pp. 140+.

poisonBlood.name: Poison Blood
poisonBlood.description: Your vitae carries venom or curse-residue usable as a weapon or deterrent.
poisonBlood.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: toxic contact or bleeding hazard; confirm toxicity rules in Dragon.

powerTastingBite.name: Power Tasting Bite
powerTastingBite.description: Sample another being’s power through a predatory bite or metaphysical ‘taste’.
powerTastingBite.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: information or stolen Might hook; confirm costs with Dragon.

seizingJaws.name: Seizing Jaws
seizingJaws.description: Manifest draconic jaws to grapple, sever, or pin.
seizingJaws.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: clinch / damage stunt; confirm with Dragon Transformation chapter.

fadeAway.name: Fade Away
fadeAway.description: Slip from notice or memory at the edge of perception.
fadeAway.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: stealth / memory-fade tilt; confirm with Dragon.

massiveBeastShape.name: Massive Beast Shape
massiveBeastShape.description: Take on a hulking draconic or beast form suited to Lindwurm themes.
massiveBeastShape.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: scale shifts for size and Might; confirm Transformation limits.

bottomlessLung.name: Bottomless Lung
bottomlessLung.description: Breathe poison, pressure, or impossible depths without failing.
bottomlessLung.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: environmental immunity hooks; confirm with Dragon.

draconicMajesty.name: Draconic Majesty
draconicMajesty.description: Wear draconic authority like regalia—crowds part, rivals hesitate.
draconicMajesty.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: Enhancement to command / presence actions; confirm with Dragon.

snappingHydrasForm.name: Snapping Hydra’s Form
snappingHydrasForm.description: Sprout extra heads or biting appendages for a devastating clinch.
snappingHydrasForm.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: extra attacks or soak hooks; confirm hydra rules in Dragon.

skinksRegrowth.name: Skink’s Regrowth
skinksRegrowth.description: Shed harm—limbs, conditions, or setbacks—through reptilian renewal.
skinksRegrowth.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: healing / injury-clear stunt with cost; confirm with Dragon.

dragonSight.name: Dragon Sight
dragonSight.description: See heat, lies, occult traces, or draconic sigils hidden from mortals.
dragonSight.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: investigative Enhancement vs concealed truths; confirm with Dragon.

eelsTrickery.name: Eel’s Trickery
eelsTrickery.description: Boneless escape, constriction, or impossible slips through tight spaces.
eelsTrickery.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: grapple escape / reach tricks; confirm with Dragon.

ironFistedRule.name: Iron Fisted Rule
ironFistedRule.description: Invoke draconic law—your word lands like a verdict backed by terror.
ironFistedRule.mechanicalEffects: Paraphrase: Judge-aligned Feat of Scale; confirm with Dragon examples (p. 113).
